title: Presumptions Affecting the Burden of Producing Evidence Defined
text: The presumptions established by this article, and all other rebuttable presumptions established by law that fall within the criteria of Section 603, are presumptions affecting the burden of producing evidence.
notes: Defines presumptions that shift the burden of producing evidence.

structure.division_title: Burden of Proof; Burden of Producing Evidence; Presumptions and Inferences
